name: Integrity of peer-to-peer distributed LLM inference under malicious nodes
summary: arXiv:2607.19490v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Peer-to-peer distributed inference executes a Large Language Model (LLM) on pooled consumer hardware by spreading its layers across many nodes. Eve...
description: arXiv:2607.19490v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Peer-to-peer distributed inference executes a Large Language Model (LLM) on pooled consumer hardware by spreading its layers across many nodes. Every request passes through nodes that are owned and controlled by multiple independent parties. However, in this setting, any party can tamper with the output of its layers to corrupt the end result. R...
author: Mert Cihangiroglu, Antonino Nocera
